_comment: Manually maintained 2026 Johor state election (SE-16) contest info. Edit freely; the pipeline merges this into seat JSONs. Set 'muda_candidate' to null if unknown. 'bloc' distinguishes MUDA vs PSM seats within the Progressive Bloc.

N.41.notes_bm: Kerusi tunggal MUDA (penyandang: Presiden Amira Aisya). Pertandingan lima penjuru.
N.41.notes_en: MUDA's sole seat (incumbent: President Amira Aisya). Five-cornered fight.
